videos.headline: Bayern Munich get two second-half goals for win over FC Cologne
videos.title: Bayern Munich get two second-half goals for win over FC Cologne
videos.caption: Bayern Munich gets second-half goals from Raphael Guerreiro and Thomas Muller as they beat FC Cologne 2-0 at home.
videos.description: Bayern Munich gets second-half goals from Raphael Guerreiro and Thomas Muller as they beat FC Cologne 2-0 at home.

videos.headline: Coman & Kane strike in Bayern's win over Mainz
videos.title: Coman & Kane strike in Bayern's win over Mainz
videos.caption: Bayern Munich cruised to a 3-1 win over Mainz to stay in touching distance of the Bundesliga leaders.

videos.headline: Muller's own goal leads to frustrating draw for Bayern Munich
videos.title: Muller's own goal leads to frustrating draw for Bayern Munich
videos.caption: Niklas Sule's goal is equalized by Thomas Muller's own goal as Bayern Munich and Bayern Leverkusen play to 1-1 draw.
videos.description: Niklas Sule's goal is equalized by Thomas Muller's own goal as Bayern Munich and Bayern Leverkusen play to 1-1 draw.
